FlavourText.original:
Fire destroys, but fire also purifies.
Life always springs anew.
FlavourText.zh_cn:
烈火带来破坏，火焰送来净化，
生命也将孕育一新。

group.original: [Allies|Allies] in your [Presence|Presence] Regenerate {0}% of their Maximum Life per second

translation.zh_cn: [Presence|在场]的[Allies|友军]每秒再生生命上限 {0}% 的生命
translation.zh_tw: 處於你的[Presence|存在範圍]中的[Allies|友方]每秒回復 {0}% 最大生命

group.original: [Allies|Allies] in your [Presence|Presence] Gain {0}% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage

translation.zh_cn: [Presence|在场]的[Allies|友军]获得相当于伤害 {0}% 的额外火焰伤害
translation.zh_tw: 在你[Presence|存在範圍]內的[Allies|友方]獲得相當於 {0}% 傷害的額外火焰傷害

group.original: Enemies in your [Presence|Presence] Resist [Elemental Damage|Elemental Damage] based on their Lowest [Resistance|Resistance]

translation.zh_cn: [Presence|在场]的敌人根据最低的[Resistance|抗性]抵抗[Elemental Damage|元素伤害]
translation.zh_tw: 敵人身處你的[Presence|存在範圍]時，其[Elemental Damage|元素傷害]抵抗以最低[Resistance|抗性]為依據
